text: my uber eats driver just texted 'good luck' and nothing else
i think my landlord is just three raccoons in a trenchcoat at this point
been on this zoom call for 2 hrs and i still dont know what we're deciding
my resume says detail oriented but i just put salt in my coffee
the couch has a permanent imprint of my body. we are one now
i have 347 tabs open and closing any of them feels like murder
decaf is just bean flavored disappointment and i will die on this hill
cried in the target parking lot again but at least i got good snacks
used all my pto to lay on the floor and stare at the ceiling. worth it
someone in the elevator asked how i was and i accidentally said 'surviving'
my plants are alive out of spite not skill
the bus was 20 min late and then three showed up at once. classic
i meal prepped on sunday and ate all five containers by tuesday
why does every dentist ask questions while their hands are in ur mouth
its 74 degrees and sunny which means tomorrow will be a blizzard probably
told myself id go to the gym today. opened the fridge instead
a bee flew into my car and i just let him drive honestly
my wifi goes out every time it rains like we live in 1996
i dont trust anyone who says they enjoy waking up early
ordered doordash from a restaurant thats a 5 min walk away. no regrets
the office thermostat is a social experiment and we are all failing
my check engine light has been on so long its basically a feature now
accidentally replied all to a company wide email. changing my name now
i am one minor inconvenience away from becoming a hermit
the grocery store moved everything around again. took me 40 min to find bread
my phone battery and my will to live drain at the same rate
why do i set 7 alarms knowing full well im snoozing all of them
the train conductor just sighed into the intercom and honestly same
bought a planner to organize my life. havent opened it since january
my neighbor mows his lawn at 7am on saturday. i wish him nothing but wet socks
im not lazy im just on energy saving mode
the self checkout machine yelled at me for an unexpected item again
every time i open linkedin i age 5 years
my cat knocked my water off the nightstand at 3am. she knows what she did
parallel parking is just geometry with consequences
i have been 'about to do laundry' for three days now
why is 'per my last email' the most violent phrase in english
the vending machine ate my dollar. this is my villain origin story
its too hot. its too cold. there are exactly 4 nice days a year
my screen time report came in and i dont want to talk about it
adulting is just googling how to do stuff and hoping for the best
the microwave at work smells like someone reheated a grudge
i put pants on today so basically im employee of the month
my horoscope said today would be great. my horoscope lied
i keep buying basil with big plans and then watching it slowly perish
the printer jammed during a deadline and i saw my whole life flash
whoever invented the snooze button understood the human condition
my jeans from 2019 no longer recognize me and thats ok
just spent 20 min looking for my phone while holding my phone
the parking garage smells like regret and old concrete
i peaked in 2012 and ive been coasting ever since tbh
my uber rating dropped and now i have trust issues
nothing humbles u faster than a glass door u thought was open
the guy at subway asked me what bread i wanted and i panicked
im running on caffeine and poor decisions. so a normal tuesday
the group chat has 47 unread messages and im choosing peace
i accidentally made eye contact with someone on the subway. we're married now
my smoke alarm goes off every time i cook and honestly fair
just realized ive been on hold for 40 min listening to jazz. kinda vibing tho
my amazon cart is a wishlist for the person i'll never be
whoever designed open office plans has never met another human
its raining and my umbrella is at home. perfectly dry. mocking me
i said 'sounds good' in 14 emails today and meant it zero times
the construction outside my window starts at 6am like clockwork. love that for me
tried to adult today. got overwhelmed. ordered pizza instead
my succulent died. it literally needed water once a month. once
i have the confidence of a soggy crouton and thats being generous
the 'we need to talk' text should be classified as a war crime
every room in my apartment has a half empty water glass. hydration distributed
my impostor syndrome has impostor syndrome at this point
the dog across the street barks at 11pm every night. we have beef now
i keep saying ill sleep early and then its 2am and im watching how forks are made
i brought my lunch today and still ordered delivery. couldnt let myself win
someone microwaved fish at work again. society has failed
the audacity of monday showing up every single week
my fitbit congratulated me for walking to the fridge. thanks i guess
existential crisis in aisle 7. cleanup needed
i started a book 3 months ago and ive read 12 pages. riveting stuff
my landlord fixed the leak with duct tape. this is fine
the streetlight outside my window flickers like a horror movie. cool cool cool
just saw a squirrel eating a whole pizza slice and felt a deep kinship
i googled my symptoms and apparently i have everything. neat
the crosswalk button doesnt do anything. its a placebo. wake up people
my air fryer is the only good decision ive made in years
tried meditation. thought about snacks the entire time
the pothole on my street has its own ecosystem at this point
i waved back at someone who wasnt waving at me. moving to another country
my wifi password is longer than most of my relationships
the ceiling fan has one speed: menacing helicopter
tried a new recipe. the fire alarm provided the review
i dont have a sleep schedule i have sleep suggestions
the bus driver closed the doors in my face. i will remember this
my shower thoughts are just anxiety with better lighting
someone left a passive aggressive note in the break room. the font was comic sans
i bought a gym membership and a donut on the same day. balance
the ice cream truck plays music at 9pm in november. chaos agent
autocorrect just changed my bosss name to 'karen'. it knows things
im not procrastinating im letting my ideas marinate
the sun came out for 10 min and everyone acted like we were saved
my quarter life crisis started at 22 and shows no signs of stopping at 29
